comments.author: backlog
comments.text: REVIEW FIX: addressed P1/P2 review findings. Added RED regression in test/execution-runtime-session.test.ts proving ephemeral loop execution profiles must not leak policy into main execution state, then fixed ExecutionRuntime to skip ExecutionState mutation for ephemeral applies and removed dead model-select suppression state. Removed Deep Mode/Rush Mode wording from bundled agent prompts and stale mode-agent terminology from tests.
